name: Ruby + Claude Dev Container
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'set -e; install -d -m 0755 /etc/apt/keyrings; curl -fsSL https://downloads.claude.ai/keys/claude-code.asc -o /etc/apt/keyrings/claude-code.asc; echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/claude-code.asc] https://downloads.claude.ai/claude-code/apt/stable stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/claude-code.list; apt-get update; apt-get install -y claude-code; git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace; ruby -e "require \"json\"; path = File.expand_path(\"~/.claude/settings.json\"); data = File.exist?(path) ? JSON.parse(File.read(path)) : {}; (data[\"permissions\"] ||= {})[\"defaultMode\"] = \"bypassPermissions\"; File.write(path, JSON.pretty_generate(data))"'
